corpus: EQO/1 canonical instance corpus — consolidated exemplar records
provenance_note: Compiled from publicly documented claims as known to the compiling model. Each record's own D/P axes encode its documentation status; 'x' marks unassessed values. Verify against primary sources before citation; corrections follow Governance G.1.

instances.label: Hutchison effect corpus
instances.note: Video/sample corpus; military delegation visits documented 1983; never independently reproduced under controls.

instances.label: Biefeld-Brown gravitator trials
instances.note: Charged asymmetric capacitors; Project Winterhaven proposal 1952.

instances.label: Lifter replications and vacuum tests
instances.principals: Community (Naudin et al.); NASA EHD studies
instances.note: Widely replicated as EHD thrust; effect vanishes in vacuum.

instances.label: Searl Effect Generator narrative
instances.note: Spin-up, weight loss, halo, cooling per narrative corpus; no controlled documentation.

instances.label: Roschin–Godin magnetic rotor experiment
instances.note: Reported weight change, pink glow, cooling around rotating magnet assembly.

instances.label: Fleischmann–Pons excess heat announcement
instances.note: Pd-D electrolysis; announcement Utah, 23 March 1989.

instances.label: Caltech/MIT cold-fusion rechecks
instances.note: Adversarial replications reporting null within calorimetric error.

instances.label: Jones low-rate fusion neutrons
instances.note: Neutron rates far below F-P heat claims.

instances.label: Helium–excess-heat correlation
instances.note: Reported He-4 commensurate with excess heat in Pd-D cells.

instances.label: Iwamura permeation transmutation findings
instances.note: Cs→Pr reported after D2 permeation through Pd/CaO multilayers.

instances.label: Acoustic cavitation 'bubble fusion'
instances.note: Sonofusion claim; later Purdue research-conduct inquiries (2008).

instances.label: Rossi E-Cat demonstrations
instances.note: Ni-H reactor demos; Industrial Heat litigation settled 2017.

instances.label: Google-funded LENR reinvestigation
instances.note: Multi-lab program; no confirmed excess heat to date.

instances.label: Rotating-superconductor weight reduction
instances.note: 0.05–0.3% weight loss reported above rotating YBCO disc.

instances.label: NASA MSFC gravity-shielding rebuilds
instances.principals: Ning Li, Ron Koczor et al.
instances.note: Partial rebuilds; no confirmed effect.

instances.label: 'Impulse gravity generator' preprint
instances.note: Claimed force beam from superconducting discharge; preprint only.

instances.label: AC Gravity LLC claims
instances.note: Announced gravity-modification research; no public results.

instances.label: Right-spinning gyroscope weight loss
instances.note: Chirality-dependent weight loss reported.

instances.label: Gyroscope null replication
instances.note: No anomaly at higher precision.

instances.label: Laithwaite gyroscope lecture
instances.note: Perceived gyro 'weight loss'; later resolved within classical mechanics.

instances.label: Spinning ball drop experiment
instances.note: Claimed altered fall/rise of rotating steel balls.

instances.label: N-machine homopolar over-unity claims
instances.note: Faraday-disc generator with claimed anomalous output.

instances.label: Allais eclipse pendulum anomalies
instances.note: Anomalous paraconical-pendulum precession during solar eclipses.

instances.label: Torsion pendulum during 1970 eclipse
instances.note: Period change reported during solar eclipse.

instances.label: Eclipse gravimeter residuals
instances.note: Small unexplained residuals during total eclipse; contested.

instances.label: Kozyrev torsion/astronomical detector claims
instances.note: 'Causal mechanics'; detectors reportedly responding to true star positions.

instances.label: EmDrive original claims
instances.note: Asymmetric resonant cavity thrust claims.

instances.label: Eagleworks EmDrive vacuum measurement
instances.note: ~1.2 mN/kW reported on torsion balance in vacuum.

instances.label: TU Dresden SpaceDrive null results
instances.note: Thrust signals traced to thermal/interaction artifacts at higher precision.

instances.label: Rotating-superconductor acceleration signals
instances.note: Reported acceleration fields near spun cryogenic rings; later attributed to artifacts by the group itself.

instances.label: Mach-effect thruster measurements
instances.note: µN-scale thrust claims on torsion balances; adversarial campaigns ongoing.

instances.label: Dean Drive reactionless-thrust claims
instances.note: Popularized via Astounding Science Fiction; friction-rectified vibration is the standard account.

instances.label: Bessler (Orffyreus) wheel
instances.note: 54-day sealed-room run, Kassel 1717, attested by officials; hidden-drive allegation by a maid.

instances.label: Keely sympathetic-vibration motors
instances.note: Posthumous 1899 findings of concealed compressed-air lines.

instances.label: Testatika (Methernitha) machine
instances.note: Influence-machine shown to visitors; independent testing declined.

instances.label: Moray radiant-energy receiver
instances.note: Multi-kW demonstrations reported by witnesses; device later destroyed.

instances.label: Hendershot fuelless generator
instances.note: Aviation-era publicity; never independently validated.

instances.label: Tesla radiant-energy apparatus patent
instances.note: Patent documents the claim (filing, not observation grade).

instances.label: Tesla mechanical-oscillator resonance lore
instances.note: Houston Street 'earthquake machine' anecdotes; resonance physics is orthodox, the magnitude lore is not.

instances.label: Steorn Orbo
instances.note: Economist ad 2006; failed Kinetica demo 2007; own jury 2009: no evidence of energy production.

instances.label: Motionless Electromagnetic Generator
instances.note: COP>1 claimed for flux-switched transformer; patent granted 2002.

instances.label: Sweet Vacuum Triode Amplifier (VTA)
instances.note: Conditioned-magnet device; witness accounts report self-powering, device weight loss under load, and cooling.

instances.label: Lutec 1000 over-unity claims
instances.note: Australian magnet-motor company; claims never independently validated.

instances.label: Quantum Energy Generator (QEG)
instances.note: Crowdfunded open-source builds; no build confirmed over-unity.

instances.label: Kapanadze generator videos
instances.note: Meter-and-lamp demonstrations; hidden-supply hypothesis repeatedly raised.

instances.label: Adams pulsed magnet motor
instances.note: Community-replicated as a motor; over-unity claim unconfirmed.

instances.label: Bedini SSG and battery rejuvenation
instances.note: Widely built pulse motor; desulfation offers a conventional account of battery 'recovery'.

instances.label: Newman Energy Machine and NBS test
instances.note: 1986 NBS measurement: efficiency below 100% on all tests; patent litigation followed.

instances.label: Coler Magnetstromapparat
instances.note: Investigated by German navy and postwar British intelligence (BIOS 2394); never reproduced.

instances.label: Howard Johnson permanent-magnet motor
instances.note: Patent granted for magnet-gate geometry; working self-runner never validated.

instances.label: Mylow magnet-motor videos
instances.note: Claimed Howard-Johnson replication; frame analysis raised a hidden-thread hypothesis.

instances.label: Steven Mark Toroidal Power Unit
instances.note: Videotaped toroid demos; device and inventor withdrew from scrutiny.

instances.label: Gray EMA motor / 'cold electricity'
instances.note: Pulsed-discharge motor; 'cold' conductor reports.

instances.label: Papp noble-gas engine demo
instances.note: Caltech demonstration ended in fatal explosion; Richard Feynman was present and wrote a skeptical account.

instances.label: Correa PAGD reactors
instances.note: Pulsed abnormal glow discharge with claimed net energy.

instances.label: Chernetsky self-generating discharge
instances.note: Soviet-era plasma-discharge over-unity reports.

instances.label: Ehrenhaft magnetic-monopole reports
instances.note: Particle motions read as 'magnetolysis'/monopoles; never confirmed.

instances.label: Meyl scalar-wave transmission kits
instances.note: Demonstration kits; conventional near-field coupling is the standard account.

instances.label: Hooper motional-field generator
instances.note: Claimed shielding-independent induced fields.

instances.label: Mills hydrino / SunCell program
instances.note: Below-ground-state hydrogen claims with extensive self-published data; demonstrates the X- private-extension mechanism of §5.

instances.label: Montagnier DNA electromagnetic signals
instances.note: Claimed EM signatures and 'teleported' DNA templates from high dilutions.

instances.label: Benveniste high-dilution study
instances.note: Basophil degranulation at extreme dilution.

instances.label: Nature supervised recheck of Benveniste
instances.principals: John Maddox, James Randi, Walter Stewart
instances.note: Blinded protocol; effect not reproduced.

instances.label: Emoto water-crystal photographs
instances.note: Selection of crystal images correlated with intentions/labels.

instances.label: Grander water vitalization
instances.note: Commercialized 'informed water' devices.

instances.label: Keshe GANS material claims
instances.note: 'Gas in nano state' production claims.

instances.label: Kervran biological transmutations
instances.note: Calcium balances in hens etc.; mass-balance errors are the standard account.

instances.label: Orgone accumulator ΔT and Einstein examination
instances.note: Einstein reproduced a ΔT and attributed it to convection; correspondence ended there.

instances.label: Rife beam-ray and universal microscope
instances.note: Claimed frequency-specific devitalization of microorganisms.

instances.label: Pyramid-power germination trials
instances.note: Seed/razor-blade claims; controlled follow-ups null.

instances.label: Grebennikov cavity-structure platform
instances.note: Book-documented levitation platform based on insect-shell geometry.

instances.label: Leedskalnin Coral Castle handling lore
instances.note: Single-handed megalith construction; documented tripod/rigging evidence offers the standard account.

instances.label: Schauberger implosion devices
instances.note: Vortex 'implosion' engineering; Repulsine lore.

instances.label: Hamel magnetic devices
instances.note: Cone-and-magnet constructions; anecdotal flight claims.

instances.label: Finsrud perpetual-motion sculpture
instances.note: Publicly exhibited rolling-ball sculpture in Norway; clever mechanics is the standard account.

instances.label: Otis Carr OTC-X1 craft
instances.note: Free-energy saucer venture (OTC-X1, 'Utron' accumulator); a 1959 public demonstration did not take place. Convicted in Oklahoma in 1961 of selling securities without registering them — a registration offense, not a finding of fraud — and fined USD 5,000; conviction affirmed on appeal.
refs: Carr v. State, 1961 OK CR 15, 359 P.2d 606 (Okla. Crim. App., 11 Jan 1961), case no. A-12907 — conviction under 71 O.S.A. § 53 affirmed.

instances.label: Meyer water fuel cell
instances.note: Above-Faraday electrolysis claims sold to investors as technology dealerships; an Ohio court found fraud in 1996 and ordered repayment of USD 25,000 to two investors, after court-appointed experts reported the cell performed conventional electrolysis. Reported contemporaneously in the press; the court record itself was not consulted.
refs: Edwards, Tony. 'End of road for car that ran on water.' The Sunday Times, 1 December 1996, Features p. 12.

instances.label: Garrett water-carburetor patent
instances.note: Patent documents the claim; demonstration press reports exist.

instances.label: Dingel water-powered car
instances.note: Philippine water-car claims; secondary sources report a 2008 estafa conviction. Not verified against a primary source.

instances.label: Brown's Gas anomalous-flame claims
instances.note: Oxyhydrogen torches are real; 'cool flame melts tungsten' anomaly claims are the delta.

instances.label: Griggs hydrosonic pump over-unity claims
instances.note: Cavitation heater; heating is orthodox, COP>1 claim is not confirmed.

instances.label: Pantone GEET fuel processor
instances.note: 'Plasma' fuel-reformer claims; community builds, no controlled validation.

instances.label: Taos Hum investigations
instances.note: Persistent low-frequency hum reports; no external source identified for most hearers.

instances.label: Golka ball-lightning attempts
instances.note: Large Tesla-coil facility aimed at reproducing ball lightning.

instances.label: Oregon Vortex / mystery-spot zones
instances.note: Tilted-frame illusion geometry is the established account.

instances.label: Orb photography corpus
instances.note: Backscatter of flash on near-lens particles is the established account.

instances.label: Crookes radiometer (migrated anomaly)
instances.note: Paradigm case: 1874 open anomaly (T0), resolved via thermal transpiration (T4). Demonstrates temporal lattice migration.
